title: Char1ie's End+
description: Charlie's End+ is a mod that tries to expand apon the current end without adding too many features.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15b19f6ba04caba922e3dd4293d91fca6d9475b8.png)
Charlie's End+ is a mod that tries to expand apon the current end without adding too many features.

Features:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This mod adds multiple new blocks and tools to aid you in your world, such as:

Naturally spawning Purpur.

Purpur Tiles and Polished Purpur.

Purpur Tools (Slightly better stone)

End Stone Tiles and Polished End Stone.

End Stone Slabs, Stairs and Walls.

Malachite Ore, Tools and Crown

More features (HOPEFULLY) coming soon.

</details>



 

If you have any ideas for additions to my mod feel free to comment, I will read them and take all of them into consideration.

Check out my other projects [here](https://modrinth.com/user/TChar1ie)
